name: Elliot Mason
abstract: Elliot Mason (born 13 January 1977) is an English jazz trombonist. He also plays the keyboard and the bass trumpet.

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: Elliot Mason was a competitor, Marshall Gilkes, all these great trombone players. ... I met — re-connected with Andre there, re-connected with Steve Davis, Elliot Mason was a competitor
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
